features.name: blocking assignment with interleaved read and write
features.description: Code should include a register with multiple blocking assignments where a read operation is interleaved between the first assignment and a second assignment, where reordering would cause incorrect semantics
features.snippet:
sv.reg : !hw.inout<i8>
sv.bpassign %reg, %a : i8
%y = sv.read_inout %reg : !hw.inout<i8>
sv.bpassign %reg, %b : i8

features.name: read after blocking assignment before subsequent write
features.description: Code should include a register that is assigned, then read to capture its value, then assigned again - the ordering of these operations must be preserved for correct output
features.snippet:
sv.bpassign %reg, %a : i8
%v = sv.read_inout %reg : !hw.inout<i8>
sv.bpassign %reg, %b : i8
sv.fwrite %fd, "%d"(%v) : i8
